basic_details.job_title: Braithwaite and Co Chairman & Managing Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Braithwaite and Co Chairman & Managing Director Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website. Has been announced through the Braithwaite and Co Chairman & Managing Director Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Engineering graduate, Chartered Accountant, Cost Accountant, Post Graduate, Graduate with MBA/PGDIM from a leading institute
qualification.details: Engineering graduate or Chartered Accountant or Cost Accountant or Post Graduate or Graduate with MBA/PGDIM from a leading institute.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Braithwaite and Co to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Braithwaite and Co Chairman & Managing Director recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Braithwaite and Co Chairman & Managing Director post is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Chairman & Managing Director post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Chairman & Managing Director post is 45 years. Candidates must meet this age criterion to be eligible for the position.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Engineering graduates, Chartered Accountants, Cost Accountants, Post Graduates, or Graduates with an MBA/PGDIM from a leading institute to be considered for the Chairman & Managing Director role.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Chairman & Managing Director position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Chairman & Managing Director post will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 180000 to Rs. 320000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Chairman & Managing Director post involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Chairman & Managing Director position is Full Time.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the official website of Braithwaite and Co. A direct link to the notification PDF is usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of recruitment articles.

faq.question: Q9. How should I apply for the Chairman & Managing Director post?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official Braithwaite and Co website on or before the last date. Ensure all details are correctly filled and required documents are uploaded.
